# uapi_mwan3_rule (Data Source)

Look up the mwan3 rule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_mwan3_rule" "example" {
  id = "<id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Resource id to look up.

### Read-Only

- `dest_ip` (String) Destination IP addresses or CIDRs.
- `dest_port` (String) Destination ports.
- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state.
- `family` (String) Address family: any, ipv4, or ipv6.
- `ipset` (String) uci option ipset.
- `logging` (Boolean) uci option logging.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
- `proto` (String) Protocol.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP addresses or CIDRs.
- `src_port` (String) Source ports.
- `sticky` (Boolean) uci option sticky.
- `timeout` (Number) uci option timeout.
- `use_policy` (String) uci option use_policy.
